name: Ana
review: Relief and results - Flourishing Family Chiropractic gets you adjusted and feeling amazing! If you are looking for a skilled chiropractor, Dr.Ila and Dr.Shelley are highly recommended. Not only are they very knowledgeable and friendly, they are also always in sync and great at explaining what will be done during the sessions and why. We started going here for our 3 month old and now the whole family is seen by Flourishing Family Chiropractic!

name: Carezza
review: Doctors and staff are wonderful and very knowledgeable. I enjoy getting my adjustments and appreciate their advice on strengthening my immune system. Very happy customer!

name: Andy
review: My BACK FEELS BETTER! More energy, more flexibility, more smiles ;). Seriously, Doctor Shelley and Doctor Ila are fantastic. They are big educators on how the spine works and is connected to other parts of your nervous system. They use technology to map out the inflammation in your spine and take photos to show how your posture has turned into a Leaning Tower. But then they follow up to show you the actual improvement. Amazing practice and people who are passionate about what they do and seemed thrilled when you tell them you are feeling better! Highly highly recommend!

name: Elene
review: Dr Shelley and Dr Ila are the best! I highly recommend them if you want to really take good care of your health. They are so knowledgeable, professional and caring. Everyone in the office is so helpful and friendly!!

name: Celeste
review: I went to FFC for chronic TMJ pain, and they have helped me to heal so much already! I was reluctant at first, but a friend recommended this group and promised they were very gentle. Their forte is how well they listen to the patient! In addition to the TMJ, they have helped me to heal other areas that I didn't even realize were a problem. I feel so much better since starting care with them! They even worked magic on my knees the day after a marathon — Dr. Shelley adjusted me and the next day my legs were 100% recovered!!

name: Katie
review: When I moved to the area a few months ago, I tried a few chiropractors simply based on Google reviews, one of them being Flourishing Family Chiropractors. After my first visit to this practice, there was no question I'd be sticking with Dr. Ila and Dr. Shelley based on the incredible care I received. Now that I've been a patient at this practice for 2+ months, I can confidently say these ladies are the BEST chiropractors around. They take the time to get to know each patient and are true miracle workers when it comes to adjustments. These ladies are SO good, I was able to convince my boyfriend to give them a try. To say he's now HOOKED is an understatement. It's amazing how much better both of us feel with routine care from these doctors. I can't recommend them enough!

name: Carla
review: Both Drs here are amazing! Highly recommended!

name: Michael
review: Dr. Shelley and Dr. Ila are both great. They listen and inform very well compared to other medical professionals I've seen. The whole staff is delightful, the office has a very friendly and welcoming vibe. Regular visits have become a part of my routine and I feel better for it.

name: Craig
review: I have been a client at Flourishing Family Chiropractic for about a year now, never a bad or disappointing experience. The staff are accommodating and professional. My wife became a client during her pregnancy with our first child, and the frequent chiropractor visits helped her move around and sleep better, and the baby was delivered with no issues. My one year old daughter has seen wonderful results with her visits since being born. As someone who went through a lower back surgery, the knowledge and expertise of the chiropractors makes me comfortable with their services. Wish I knew about the positive effects that visiting a chiropractor could have had before my surgery. I'm quite sure I could have avoided the surgery altogether.

name: Heather
review: Love this place! A wonderful approach to whole body health with great people and doctors who are invested in you.

name: Monica
review: I definitely feel like I'm walking into a group/family who genuinely cares about me rather than labeling me as a "number". The doctors cater to your issues and will work out a real treatment plan. I'm thankful and grateful to have met such amazing people. I say this to Dr Shelley and Dr Ila almost every visit! Theyve helped me a lot and thanks to them I feel more confident in myself ❤️

name: Bruce
review: I started going because my wife is a patient and I couldn't be happier that I did. Caring, compassionate and educational are 3 words to describe both doctors. They make it easy to understand what they are trying to accomplish and walk you through it each step of the way. Gonstead is the way to go and flourishing family Chiro is the place you should be going !

name: Peter
review: Great place! They make you feel comfortable and very informative!

name: Mara
review: My daughter and I have been coming here since April 2022 and have nothing bad to say. Dr. Ila and Dr. Shelley are both great listeners and believe in the mind/body connection. They share their experiences with us, and they are compassionate and sensitive to individual preferences and levels of comfort. Don't hesitate.

name: Jesse
review: They are amazing, attentive, and understanding. Highly recommended

name: Sandro
review: Flourishing Family Chiropractor, led by the dedicated doctors Shelley and Ila, has been an essential part of my life for the past two and half years. As someone who sits all day at work, maintaining good back health and posture is crucial. Their expertise and care have significantly improved my well-being in these areas. I highly recommend Flourishing Family Chiropractor for anyone seeking effective chiropractic care in a welcoming environment.

name: Tim
review: The best chiropractor I've ever been too. When I first went I couldn't lift my arms above 90 degrees and back was always killing me. They laid out a schedule and I feel amazing. Not just a client, they treat you like family. Top notch

name: John
review: I have been coming to Dr. Shelly and Dr. Ila for over 7 years— and when we had kids, both our daughters started at 4 days old. To keep feeling strong, keep the pain away and overall wellness, there isn't another place we trust more than Flourishing Family.

name: Carla
review: I went for my 1st visit and was happy with my consultation. The Dr. was thorough and did all types of different test and gave me a script to get an xray done so she can see the underlying problem in my back. I have been to different chiropractors but Dr. S is serious about the pain you are going through and does not jump in to trying to twist you or maneuver you in any way. I am also the flexibility in hours and how close I live by. Looking forward to my next appt.

name: Elene
review: excellent doctors and staff! very professional, knowledgeable and personable!

name: Jason
review: I absolutely love Dr Ila and Dr Shelly. I've been with them for 3 years. The entire staff is very caring and helpful. I trust them more than I can explain. Coming to them was best decision ever. I can't thank them enough for all they've done and all they continue to do.

name: Vic
review: Amazing ! I came in with terrible sciatic pain about a year ago, which no longer exists thanks to this place. I learned so much about my posture & spine health. Everyone in the office are very nice & accommodating. Fully recommend.

name: Winnie
review: I have been a patient since 2022 and they are awesome. The staff are professional, caring and most of all friendly. Flourishing Family also provides nutritional services which I have benefited from greatly.

name: Radwa
review: Great service and care. Courtesy, professionalism and dedication

name: Brenda
review: I've been going to Dr. Shelly for over 10 years. I was having severe lower back pain. I went from having to go 3 times a week to now only going for maintenance. Dr Ila is also terrific! They are so careful and caring. I highly recommend them if you want to feel good.

name: Kate
review: Now both of my children has been to see Dr Shelley and Dr Ila in their first few weeks of life, and I wouldn't change it for anything. they were integral in our successful breastfeeding journey with my first, and I know it will be the same case with my second. On top of that they aided in my pregnancy and post-partum care for myself. I couldn't recommend them enough

name: Hope
review: Warm and Welcoming. The Doctors and the staff are excellent and friendly. The doctor's really listen to your concerns and treat accordingly. Always a nice experience.

name: Emma
review: Dr Shelly and Dr Ila are the best people ever and are best at listening to people! when my back hurts and can go and they will fix it and it feels so good i love them so much ❤️

name: Alexandra
review: Drs. Shelley and Ila truly care about their patients. They don't just alleviate the symptoms; they look to fix the root cause. They also advise healthy living solutions and can order functional tests. I feel absolutely comfortable as a patient in their practice!

name: Kelly
review: Both Dr. Ila and Dr. Shelley are amazing! They have helped me so much and I am so grateful I found them. Amy is very helpful and great also!

name: Shanita
review: Dr.s Ila and Shelley are absolutely the best of the best. The practice is so unique as compared with other chiropractic practitioners. The intake is much more thorough and they will literally show you your problem areas and explain your treatment plan. As you progress through the weeks you will see and feel your body changing. There's no 3 visit a week recommendation, as the body needs time to restore post adjustment. No tens machines that do nothing in the long run. They also provide follow up checkups that you can compare to the initial assessment and really see your advancement towards wellness. I refer all my friends, family and doula clients their way!
